changeSet.author: migration
changeSet.comment: Update tracks table check constraint to include SHO, IDS, COM track types
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE tracks DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS tracks_type_check; ALTER TABLE tracks ADD CONSTRAINT tracks_type_check CHECK (type IN ('MUS', 'ADV', 'PSA', 'LIN', 'INT', 'PRO', 'SHO', 'IDS', 'COM', 'NEW'));
